why_it_matters: Adds nuance to the neurologic/nausea review of systems and reassures the symptom is hunger-related, but is mild and non-actionable.
A vasovagal history with blood draws is actionable for the multiple specimens collected today and warrants documented precautions to prevent syncope-related injury.
Activity and dietary counseling documents patient education completeness for the initial prenatal visit but has low clinical risk if omitted.
Announcement timing is a psychosocial/personal matter with no medical impact on management or safety.
